description: You are a community theater administrator preparing the program booklet for tomorrow night's opening of 'The Importance of Being Earnest'. Open /home/ga/Documents/raw_playbill.docx and format it into a printable A5 booklet with 0.5-inch margins. Apply the 'Heading 1' style to the section titles 'Director's Note', 'Cast of Characters', 'Act Synopsis', and 'Cast Biographies'. Center-align the main title 'The Importance of Being Earnest' at the top with a font size of at least 24pt. Format the list of roles and actors in the 'Cast of Characters' section into a 2-column layout while keeping the rest of the document single-column. In the 'Cast Biographies' section, bold the actor's name preceding the hyphen in each paragraph. Insert a centered page number in the footer. Save the finalized document to /home/ga/Documents/formatted_playbill.docx.
